# Release v1.4.0

Bug fixes, test coverage improvements, and CI integration with fallow code health analysis.

---

## Changelog

## [1.4.0] - 2026-06-03

### Added

- `GameEvent.PLAYER_MOVE` is now emitted by `savePlayerMove` with correct `index` payload
- `GameEvent.RESET` is now emitted exclusively by `reset()` — no longer fires on every state update
- `GameEvent.STATE_CHANGE` is now also emitted by `backToMove`
- CI workflow (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`) with test coverage and fallow health analysis on push to `main` and pull requests
- `test:coverage` script in `package.json` — runs vitest with v8 coverage
- `fallow` script in `package.json` — runs `fallow health` with coverage data
- `fallow` added to `devDependencies`
- `@vitest/coverage-v8` added to `devDependencies`
- Test suite expanded to 38 tests covering all event contracts, snapshot stability, `_gameStatus` reference preservation, custom board size, and all 8 winning combinations

### Fixed

- `_updateGameState` was incorrectly emitting `GameEvent.RESET` on every `savePlayerMove` and `backToMove` call
- `GameEvent.PLAYER_MOVE` was never emitted (missing emit in `_updateGameState`)
- `_gameStatus` reference was unnecessarily replaced with a new object on every move when the game remained in `"running"` state

### Changed

- `Board._curretnFields` renamed to `Board._currentFields` (typo fix)
- `coverage/` added to `.gitignore`

[1.4.0]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.3.0...v1.4.0
